question: What are the steps to inspect the spark plug on a snowmobile?
content:
1. Periodically remove the spark plug and inspect the white porcelain insulator around the center electrode. A normally used machine should show a medium to light tan color.
2. If the plug color is distinctly different, do not try to diagnose the engine yourself. A very white center-electrode porcelain can indicate an intake-tract air leak or carburetion problem, so take the machine to a dealer.
3. Use only a spark plug with the proper reach: BR250T is 12.7 mm (0.50 in), and CS340E/ET410TR/VK540E is 19.0 mm (0.75 in).<PIC>
4. Before installing the plug, measure the electrode gap with a wire thickness gauge and adjust it to specification; the plug drawing identifies reach as 1 and electrode gap as 2.<PIC>
5. Clean the gasket surface, wipe grime from the threads, and torque the spark plug to 28 Nm (2.8 m-kg, 20 ft-lb). Consult your dealer before changing to a different type of spark plug.
ret:
"1. Periodically remove the spark plug and inspect the white porcelain insulator around the center electrode. A normally used machine should show a medium to light tan color.
2. If the plug color is distinctly different, do not try to diagnose the engine yourself. A very white center-electrode porcelain can indicate an intake-tract air leak or carburetion problem, so take the machine to a dealer.
3. Use only a spark plug with the proper reach: BR250T is 12.7 mm (0.50 in), and CS340E/ET410TR/VK540E is 19.0 mm (0.75 in).<PIC>
4. Before installing the plug, measure the electrode gap with a wire thickness gauge and adjust it to specification; the plug drawing identifies reach as 1 and electrode gap as 2.<PIC>
5. Clean the gasket surface, wipe grime from the threads, and torque the spark plug to 28 Nm (2.8 m-kg, 20 ft-lb). Consult your dealer before changing to a different type of spark plug.",["Manual34_138", "Manual34_139"]
notes: Answered from the Yamaha Snowmobile SPARK PLUG INSPECTION section. Included the reach-value figure and the reach/gap drawing because they directly support the proper-reach and electrode-gap steps. The allowed Markdown says to adjust the electrode gap to specification but does not state a numeric gap value in the inspected spark plug section.
